name: Hunting Simulator Game: Sniper Hunter VR

reviews.review_title: This game is amazing its so good ❤️🇮🇱❤
reviews.review_description: I love this game so much, its so amazing, im a young kid from tel aviv, israel and my lifes been kinda hard but this game is so nice it reminds me of my childhood because my uncle always went hunting, wierd that he never brought home any animals or meat but its still so relaxing because this game is the best goy game ever i love it so much its amazing i really cant say how much goy this game is its so good, this game has insane graphics, mechanics, everything. It gets 10/10 on the goy scale for me its so good, greetings from tel aviv israel much love my dear 🇮🇱🇮🇱🇮🇱🇮🇱❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️😁😁😁😁😁

developer_response.body:
Wow, thank you so much for this amazing review! ❤️

Reading messages like yours truly makes our day. We're incredibly happy to hear that the game brings you relaxation and good memories. Knowing that players from all around the world are enjoying our work is the biggest reward we could ask for.

We also recently released a brand-new hunting game, *Hunting Shooter: Sniper Simulator* https://vr.meta.me/s/2Cbv3zYPdhLbtSe , featuring a large open world, vehicles, realistic sniper shooting, and many different animals to discover. We'd be honored if you gave it a try, and we'd love to hear what you think about it as well!

Thank you again for your support and kind words. Sending our best wishes to you❤️

reviews.review_description:
Feature 1: please add open world im looking for those hunting games.
Feature 2:make the game more realistic like for the bullets to look real not like airsoft bullets and make it so u can skin.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the suggestions! We actually took a lot of feedback like yours into account when developing our newest hunting game, Hunting Shooter: Sniper Simulator  https://vr.meta.me/s/2Cbv3zYPdhLbtSe

It features a large open world, realistic long-range shooting with bullet drop and ballistics, vehicles for exploring the map, and a much wider variety of animals and hunting environments. We're continuing to improve and expand it based on player feedback. 🎯🦌

reviews.review_description: This game had no sound effects from the animals and was not immersive if you want something just like hunting this is not the game.

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing your thoughts with us. We totally understand how important atmosphere and animal sounds are for a great hunting experience. Since then, we’ve actually released a brand-new hunting game Hunting Shooter: Sniper Simulator with much better sound design, more immersive environments, and improved wildlife behavior. We’d genuinely love for you to check it out and hear the difference for yourself!

developer_response.body: Hi. Please provide more information: what error are you getting when downloading? What exactly is not working? We will try to help.

reviews.review_description: this is the most fun hunting game i've played
I love this
This game could be great if you added more maps, more game, and made the gun mechanics more realistic. Not the worst game I’ve played but not the best either

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thank you for your feedback. We agree that the game still has room for improvement. We've written about this in the description, and that's why it's free, so you can experience the game for yourself without having to purchase it. We're not a huge professional studio, but a group of enthusiasts who love creating games, essentially doing so with only their own money. Therefore, it's especially sad to see a game given one star, despite acknowledging that it's far from the worst and hopeless.
In any case, we appreciate your polite criticism.
Have a nice day!

it is fun
Its a good game but can you make it more realistic
this game would be good if it wasnt a cash grab why only 2 guns that cant be modified and using reviews to "uptade" the game isnt jackimg up prises dp better

developer_response.body: Hi! Thank you for your review and the high rating — we really appreciate it. We haven’t changed the prices since the game was released; the only possible differences may come from local taxes in your country, which are automatically included in the price. You’re absolutely right that the game still has room to grow, and we’re actively thinking about how to improve it. At the same time, as you can imagine, development isn’t free, so optional in-game purchases help us fund further updates and continued development. We truly love making games and do our best to keep doing what we love while staying afloat in a world dominated by large studios. Wishing you great hunts and accurate shots!

reviews.review_description: W
Picked up a new knife and the game crashed and I couldn’t leave the game and couldn’t decline to buy it had to uninstall and I now I can’t play anything now it’s just the mixed reality screen no menu

developer_response.body:
Hi there! We’re sorry to hear you’ve run into some issues with the game. Could you please share a bit more information so we can help resolve it? We tested the payment system and didn’t find any problems. Could you check whether the payment went through and if the purchased knife appeared after you restarted the game?
Mixed reality shows up when you step outside the play area you set in your headset settings. To continue playing, you’ll need to return to your play area or set up a new one.

developer_response.body: Hi. We're sorry to hear you didn't enjoy the game. Have you tried walking around the map and looking for a boar? They don't just run to you in this game, you have to find them. We've definitely checked. :)

reviews.review_title: This game is stupid but in a fun way!
reviews.review_description: Does it have the best graphics? No. does it have the best movement? No. Does it have the best aiming? No. Is it the most realistic guns? No. Did I have fun running directly at the animals with a knife? HELL YEAH! It’s free and fun for a short goofy bit. Could definitely see a streamer spending a few minutes to mess around and be silly with chat! Oh and if it does get better I think it would be funny to keep  the graphics the same.
Very fun
Its pat to win guns cost money for wepons

developer_response.body: Hi! We're sorry to see you weren't enjoying the game. The game features several completely free weapons, just like the game itself. However, there are also paid weapons with improved stats. We'd love to make everything free, but unfortunately, no one wants to develop a game without paying us. We hope this doesn't stop you from enjoying the hunt! Have a nice day :)

reviews.review_description: Not the best quality, but for a free game it’s quite enjoyable, especially when I’m waiting for a game to download or just a break.
Trash fr

developer_response.body: Hello! We're sorry to see that you didn't enjoy the game and that you left such a negative review without any explanation. We'd like to take your comments into account to improve the game in the future. Let's be a little kinder to others and use polite criticism:) Have a nice day, and may God bless you.

This has great room to grow, and I think it needs to go into the horror genre. If you have ever played or seen Squirrel Stapler, this has that vibe to it. I think after a point, you should try to jump scare the player, and before that, add some intense music winding up to the jump scare like a squirrel stapler.￼

reviews.review_title: To all the people who rated 5 stars
reviews.review_description: Have you actually played the gams you're rating? Try opening it by clicking play. I get that it's free and someone put a few hours into it but the guns feel bad and don't work properly. The animals don't behave right. You move like a snail so by the time you realize how bad it sucks your already 10 minutes in. It's a waste of your oh so precious battery life. Seriously you'll have more fun playing the Oregon trail if you want basic hunting mechanics.

developer_response.body:
Hi. We are sorry that you didn't like the game. Meta checks all reviews and deletes fake ones, so 5 star ratings are real.  There are many people in the world and they have different opinions on the same things. Someone appreciates the work of others and tries to inspire them to do more, someone respectfully criticizes, and someone will always try to humiliate and devalue everything around them. Everyone chooses for themselves which of these people to be.
All the best to you and have a nice day! :)

reviews.review_description: I was making a YouTube vid, and out of nowhere the bear had red eyes and chased me. Is there a jumpscare or not?

At first I thought it was gonna be like a actual ￼fun hunting game but all you do is walk around u can’t even run and when you try to use your sniper it so hard to aim.  So I wouldn’t recommend if you’ve been looking for a fun hunting game

developer_response.body: Hi! We are sorry to hear that you did not like the game. In the settings, you can change the speed of the hero's movement. We did not initially set a high speed of movement, because for some people it may be very unusual. You also need to get used to the gun, for this there is a training period, in addition, you can change it to another one if you wish. We hope that after further updates you will like the game.

reviews.review_title: This game is so realistic, in shooting
reviews.review_description: This game is so realistic compared to real life, except in the amount of animals, its so fun to shoot all of them and be scared when a bear is coming right at you. (Amount of trees is too low and amount of animals too high) pls add birds.

developer_response.body: Many thanks for your feedback! We are happy to see that you enjoy the game:) We'll think how to add birds in this game, but at the same time you can try our Duck Hunting Game. There you can hunt for different types of birds. It's free also.

reviews.review_description: Early good, feels great on vr

developer_response.body:
Meta checks all reviews and deletes fake ones.
There are many people in the world and they have different opinions on the same things. Someone appreciates the work of others and tries to inspire them to do more, someone respectfully criticizes, and someone will always try to humiliate and devalue everything around them. Everyone chooses for themselves which of these people to be.
We will be grateful if you send us a link to your game, which is so easy to make in a couple of hours using pre made models. We would like to learn from you. We are serious, no sarcasm.
All the best to you and have a nice day! :)
